headlines.title: Mariners Spring Breakout roster 2026 announced
headlines.summary: Spring Breakout is back in 2026, creating a showcase-type opportunity for the best and brightest prospects. The Mariners are ranked No. 1 in MLB's 'most loaded' Spring Breakout rosters.

headlines.title: Mariners make 5 more roster moves as opener nears
headlines.summary: The Seattle Mariners optioned three more players to Triple-A Tacoma and re-assigned two to minor league camp as spring training wraps up. Opening Day roster decisions are being finalized.

headlines.title: Mitch Garver re-signed with Seattle on minor league contract
headlines.summary: Catcher Mitch Garver re-signed with the Mariners on a minor league contract. Pitchers and catchers reported to Peoria Sports Complex in early February.

headlines.title: Rashid Shaheed returns on three-year, $51 million deal
headlines.summary: Wide receiver Rashid Shaheed returns to Seattle on a three-year, $51 million deal with $34.7 million guaranteed, according to ESPN's Adam Schefter.

headlines.title: Josh Jones remains with Seahawks on one-year deal
headlines.summary: Offensive lineman Josh Jones remains with the Seahawks on a one-year deal, providing continuity on the offensive line.

headlines.title: Chazz Surratt set to return as core special teamer
headlines.summary: Linebacker Chazz Surratt will be back in a Seahawks uniform in 2026. He has logged over 700 special teams snaps between his time with the Jets and Seahawks.

headlines.title: Riq Woolen departs for Philadelphia Eagles on one-year deal
headlines.summary: Cornerback Riq Woolen is leaving Seattle, signing a one-year deal with the Philadelphia Eagles.

headlines.title: Kraken unveil new black third jersey with sonar-inspired stripes
headlines.summary: The Seattle Kraken unveiled a new third jersey for the 2025-26 season. The jersey is black with sonar-inspired stripes on the sleeves and socks.

headlines.title: Kraken defeat Panthers 6-2 in much-needed win
headlines.summary: On March 15, the Seattle Kraken hosted the Florida Panthers and secured a 6-2 victory, their first meeting of the 2025-26 season.

headlines.title: Matt Murray signed during 2025 offseason to bolster goaltending
headlines.summary: After getting poor goaltending last season, the Kraken signed Matt Murray during the 2025 offseason and are carrying three goaltenders to ensure adequate rest.

headlines.title: Sounders play to scoreless draw with Minnesota United
headlines.summary: The Seattle Sounders played to a scoreless draw with Minnesota United, recording their fourth shutout in five MLS matches this season.

headlines.title: Sounders to face Vancouver Whitecaps in Spokane for Concacaf Champions Cup
headlines.summary: For the first time as an MLS club, the Seattle Sounders will play in Spokane at ONE Spokane Stadium for the second leg of the Concacaf Champions Cup against Vancouver Whitecaps.

headlines.title: 2026 is final season under spring-autumn MLS format
headlines.summary: The 2026 season will be the last under the spring-autumn format used by MLS since 1996. The league plans to use an autumn-spring schedule beginning in late 2027 with a long winter break.
